description: Crew sizes, productivity rates, task dependencies, trade coordination

often_missed: Cable pull needs conduit 100% complete including couplings tight and reamed
Instrument tubing cannot connect until process piping hydro test complete
Heat tracing must be installed AND tested before insulation goes over it
Megger testing BEFORE terminations to equipment (internal surge suppression gives false readings)
Fire stops AFTER all cables pulled through penetration
Grounding system complete before any equipment energized

electricians_need_from.pipefitters: Process connections complete and hydro tested before instrument tie-in
electricians_need_from.ironworkers: Steel erected, platforms/grating in place before tray/conduit at elevation
electricians_need_from.civil: Cable trench/duct bank poured, equipment foundations complete
electricians_need_from.insulation: Stay off until heat trace installed and tested
electricians_need_from.mechanical: Equipment set, aligned, anchored before power cable connections

others_need_from_electricians: Temporary power and lighting installed early (critical path)
Motor rotation confirmed before mechanical alignment finalized
Control systems ready for functional testing when operations commissioning
Grounding connections to steel, pipe, equipment
common_coordination_failures: Tray/conduit installed before steel 100% — rework when steel completed
Insulation over untested heat trace — must tear off to fix
Motor connected before mechanical alignment — electricians blamed for shift
Instrument tubing connected before process hydro — tubing damaged
Fire stops not installed before adjacent zone commissioned
